name: not-revenue-yet
description: A proof-first operating layer for Codex agents pursuing revenue.

interface.shortDescription: Verify earning claims before agents act.
interface.longDescription: Vet bounties, contests, freelance work, and product ideas against live evidence; preserve authorization boundaries; and count money only after settlement.
defaultPrompt: Vet this paid opportunity before I spend time on it.
Show what is pipeline versus settled revenue.
Build a safe zero-spend revenue plan.
